title: Garden Route Dam level at 43.48%
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS -  The latest dam level update, supplied by George Municipality on 13 January:

Garden Route Dam Level

- Dam level: 43.48 % (Compared to 46.63% on 22 December)
- Rainfall: 7.5 mm (Measured from 6 - 12 January)

Haarlem Dam Level

- Dam level: 30,42 %
- Rainfall: 2 mm (Measured from 6 - 12 January)

The Level 2D water restrictions implemented currently can be found here.


> The cooperation of all users of municipal water is essential and is greatly appreciated.


Households are limited to 10 kilolitres per month under Level 2D. Use above this limit will be billed at Level 3 Emergency Tariffs.

Small daily savings, shorter showers, fewer washes, using grey water, can make a big difference.


> Report leaks or misuse:


- 044 801 9262 / 66 | 044 801 6300
- Violations: 044 801 6350 | 044 801 6300


## Where water is scarce:


Previous articles:

- Garden Route Dam level at 46,63%
- Garden Route Dam level at 47.65%
- Garden Route Dam level at 49.43%
- Garden Route Dam level at 50,98%
- Garden Route Dam level at 53,22%

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
